input: Enable checklists AND playbook runs in DM/GM channels. Certain playbook automations are disabled or annotated for DM/GM. Backstage visibility includes DM/GM items with proper team scoping and permissions.

1-requirements.notes: Spec pivoted multiple times: checklists-only → runs+checklists. Final scope in spec.md.

2-plan.notes: Original plan superseded by iterative implementation. Surface audit in findings/.

3-implement.notes: 30+ commits. Full DM/GM support for runs and checklists. Backstage visibility, permissions, editor hints, URL fixes, owner auto-assign, invite skip.

4-test.notes: E2E: 15 tests (dm 8, gm 6, start_run 1). Unit: 4 Go tests. Need E2E re-run after latest changes + manual verification.
